company.what_they_do: Positive Behavior Steps (PBS) is a California-based ABA (Applied Behavior Analysis) therapy provider serving children, adolescents, and adults with Autism and other developmental disabilities. They deliver individualized, evidence-based ABA therapy in clinic, home, and school settings, as well as Community Integration services, Supported Living Services, and Independent Living Services. Programs typically run 15–40 hours per week and include 1:1 parent education. They are based in San Dimas, CA (910 W Gladstone St Ste B) and serve the San Gabriel Valley, San Fernando Valley, Los Angeles, and San Bernardino areas.
raw_notes: Founded in 2017 as Positive Behavior Steps Corp.
Website: pbxsteps.org — confirmed as the correct domain for the org.
Core service: Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) therapy for children/adolescents/adults diagnosed with Autism, ASD, OCD, ADD, ADHD, Down Syndrome, and other developmental disabilities.
Service delivery settings: in-clinic, in-home, school, and community settings.
Service lines: ABA therapy, Community Integration (CI), Supported Living Services (SLS), Independent Living Services (ILS).
Programs are designed and overseen by Board Certified Behavior Analysts (BCBAs) and Clinical Supervisors.
Staff roles include BCBAs, Clinical Supervisors, Behavior Technicians (BTs), Community Facilitators, ILS Facilitators, and Administrative Support Specialists.
Comprehensive programs run 15–30 hrs/week (homepage) or 25–40 hrs/week (chamber listing) and include 1:1 parent guidance.
Strong family-centered philosophy: parent involvement is actively encouraged.
Geographic service area: San Gabriel Valley, San Fernando Valley, Los Angeles, San Bernardino Valley.
Physical office: 910 W Gladstone Suite B, San Dimas, CA 91773.
Mission: 'to empower individuals with developmental disabilities and their families by providing compassionate, evidence-based ABA services.'
Noted community focus: dedicated to supporting families in low-income communities where quality services are lacking.
Listed in the Frank D. Lanterman Regional Center service directory (a California regional center network for developmental disabilities).
Also a member of the San Dimas Chamber of Commerce.
Active on Instagram (@pbxsteps, ~236 followers), Facebook, and LinkedIn (~129 followers).
CEO per ContactOut (third-party aggregator, unverified): Connie Bergman.

individual.name: Karina
individual.notes: The signup email is pbxadmin@pbxsteps.org, which strongly suggests an administrative role at PBS (the 'admin' prefix is a standard indicator of an admin/office function). No person named 'Karina' appears in any first-party PBS web pages, LinkedIn profiles, or publicly findable staff listings. The ContactOut staff directory lists several PBS employees (Gabriela Gonzalez – Community Integration Supervisor, Anabella Rojas – Administrative Specialist, Diana Perez – Assistant, Jennifer Mota – Administrative Assistant, Joanne Kim – Behavior Technician) but no 'Karina.' The general admin contact for PBS is admin@pbxsteps.org; the signup used pbxadmin@pbxsteps.org, which could be a variant admin inbox or a personal admin account. No LinkedIn, news, or other public profile found for a Karina at this organization.
